'''âv-k-k''' ('''vakaka''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:moosh|moosh]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-k-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:moosh|moosh]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-k-k
|-
! Lemma
| vakaka
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vakakithi|vakakithi]] || [[word:vakakiji|vakakiji]] || [[word:vakakishi|vakakishi]] || [[word:vakaki|vakaki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vakakuthuth|vakakuthuth]] || [[word:vakakujuj|vakakujuj]] || [[word:vakakushush|vakakushush]] || [[word:vakak|vakak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vakakuthu|vakakuthu]] || [[word:vakakuju|vakakuju]] || [[word:vakakushu|vakakushu]] || [[word:vakaku|vakaku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vakakufuth|vakakufuth]] || [[word:vakakufuj|vakakufuj]] || [[word:vakakufush|vakakufush]] || [[word:vakakuf|vakakuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vakakethe|vakakethe]] || [[word:vakakeje|vakakeje]] || [[word:vakakeshe|vakakeshe]] || [[word:vakake|vakake]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vakakothoth|vakakothoth]] || [[word:vakakojoj|vakakojoj]] || [[word:vakakoshosh|vakakoshosh]] || [[word:vakak|vakak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vakakotho|vakakotho]] || [[word:vakakojo|vakakojo]] || [[word:vakakosho|vakakosho]] || [[word:vakako|vakako]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vakakofoth|vakakofoth]] || [[word:vakakofoj|vakakofoj]] || [[word:vakakofosh|vakakofosh]] || [[word:vakakof|vakakof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vakakĂŠthĂŠ|vakakĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:vakakĂŠjĂŠ|vakakĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:vakakĂŠshĂŠ|vakakĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:vakakĂŠ|vakakĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vakakathath|vakakathath]] || [[word:vakakajaj|vakakajaj]] || [[word:vakakashash|vakakashash]] || [[word:vakak|vakak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vakakatha|vakakatha]] || [[word:vakakaja|vakakaja]] || [[word:vakakasha|vakakasha]] || [[word:vakaka|vakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vakakafath|vakakafath]] || [[word:vakakafaj|vakakafaj]] || [[word:vakakafash|vakakafash]] || [[word:vakakaf|vakakaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:vakakasha|vakakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:govakakasha|govakakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokivakakasha|gokivakakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:vakaknĂŒsha|vakaknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:govakaknknĂŒsha|govakaknknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokivakaknĂŒsha|gokivakaknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vakakshĂ«sha|vakakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govakaknkshĂ«sha|govakaknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivakakshĂ«sha|gokivakakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vakakrosha|vakakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:govakaknkrosha|govakaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivakakrosha|gokivakakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vakakmusha|vakakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:govakaknkmusha|govakaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivakakmusha|gokivakakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:vakaksherasha|vakaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:govakaknksherasha|govakaknksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokivakaksherasha|gokivakaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:vakakngasha|vakakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:govakaknkngasha|govakaknkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokivakakngasha|gokivakakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vakakyasha|vakakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:govakaknkyasha|govakaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokivakakyasha|gokivakakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:vakakyamasha|vakakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:govakaknkyamasha|govakaknkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokivakakyamasha|gokivakakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:vakaknĂŒshĂ«sha|vakaknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:govakaknknĂŒshĂ«sha|govakaknknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivakaknĂŒshĂ«sha|gokivakaknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vakaknĂŒrosha|vakaknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govakaknknĂŒrosha|govakaknknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivakaknĂŒrosha|gokivakaknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vakaknĂŒmusha|vakaknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govakaknknĂŒmusha|govakaknknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivakaknĂŒmusha|gokivakaknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:vakakshĂ«nĂŒsha|vakakshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:govakaknkshĂ«nĂŒsha|govakaknkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivakakshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokivakakshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vakakshĂ«rosha|vakakshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govakaknkshĂ«rosha|govakaknkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivakakshĂ«rosha|gokivakakshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vakakshĂ«musha|vakakshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govakaknkshĂ«musha|govakaknkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivakakshĂ«musha|gokivakakshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:vakakronĂŒsha|vakakronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:govakaknkronĂŒsha|govakaknkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivakakronĂŒsha|gokivakakronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:vakakroshĂ«sha|vakakroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:govakaknkroshĂ«sha|govakaknkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivakakroshĂ«sha|gokivakakroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vakakromusha|vakakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govakaknkromusha|govakaknkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivakakromusha|gokivakakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:vakakmunĂŒsha|vakakmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:govakaknkmunĂŒsha|govakaknkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivakakmunĂŒsha|gokivakakmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:vakakmushĂ«sha|vakakmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:govakaknkmushĂ«sha|govakaknkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivakakmushĂ«sha|gokivakakmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vakakmurosha|vakakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govakaknkmurosha|govakaknkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivakakmurosha|gokivakakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:vakak|vakak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:vĂŠkĂŠk|vĂŠkĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hovakak|hovakak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hovĂŠkĂŠk|hovĂŠkĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohovakak|hohovakak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohovĂŠkĂŠk|hohovĂŠkĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒvakak|nĂŒvakak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒvĂŠkĂŠk|nĂŒvĂŠkĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒvakak|nĂŒnĂŒvakak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒvĂŠkĂŠk|nĂŒnĂŒvĂŠkĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻvakak|nĂŻvakak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻvĂŠkĂŠk|nĂŻvĂŠkĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻvakak|nĂŻnĂŻvakak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻvĂŠkĂŠk|nĂŻnĂŻvĂŠkĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luvakak|luvakak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luvĂŠkĂŠk|luvĂŠkĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluvakak|luluvakak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluvĂŠkĂŠk|luluvĂŠkĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:livakak|livakak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:livĂŠkĂŠk|livĂŠkĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilivakak|lilivakak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilivĂŠkĂŠk|lilivĂŠkĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kovakak|kovakak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kovĂŠkĂŠk|kovĂŠkĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokovakak|kokovakak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokovĂŠkĂŠk|kokovĂŠkĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kevakak|kevakak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kevĂŠkĂŠk|kevĂŠkĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekevakak|kekevakak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekevĂŠkĂŠk|kekevĂŠkĂŠk]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
